description: Detects integer overflow risks in Go: narrowing type conversions to int8, int16, int32, uint8, uint16, uint32. JSON version matches all call_expression with identifier function (type conversion syntax) because #match? predicate not supported. Precision reduced per D-07 -- also matches non-type-conversion calls like append() or len().

flag.message: Type conversion call detected -- verify this is not a narrowing conversion to int8/int16/int32/uint8/uint16/uint32 that may overflow
